---
title: "Projeto 1"
format: revealjs
embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute:
    echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
  embed-resources: true
toc-title: "Projeto 1"
lang: pt
---

## 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
library(plotly)
library(skimr)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
gt()
```
